91.17(1): sems dpa' rnams la 'di skad ces bka' stsal pa/ g.yung drung gtsug gshen rgyal 
91.18(1): ba gzhan yang gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po/ rigs 
91.19(1): kyi bu/ bon thams cad zad pa med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings su sangs rgyas par

241.3(1): med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ mig gi 'dus te reg par shes pa'i rkyen

308.20(1): 7 rigs kyi bu/ 'di lta ste/ 'gyur ba med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad 
308.21(1): ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ dbang po thams cad 'gyur ba med par ye nas

396.2(1): thon mthing g.yas su 'khyil pa ni/ sku mtshan bzang po'i me tog lags so/ /dpral 
396.3(1): ba ni sku'i cha byad yin la/ rgya che la zla ba gam pa 'dra ba ni/ sku mtshan bzang po'i 
396.4(1): me tog lags so/ /spyan mig ni sku'i cha byad yin la/ bkra la ring ba skar chen la

396.7(1): tog lags so/ /rdzi ma ni sku'i cha byad yin la/ srab la 'brel ma chad pa khra gshog

396.11(1): ni/ sku mtshan bzang po'i me tog lags so/ /ya mchu ni sku'i cha byad yin la/ srab 
396.12(1): la sul dod pa dar dkar la chag btags pa 'dra ba ni/ sku mtshan bzang po'i me 
396.13(1): tog lags so/ /ma mchu ni sku'i cha byad yin la/ srab la legs pa zar ma'i me tog 
396.14(1): 'dra ba ni/ sku mtshan bzang po'i me tog lags so/ /ljags ni sku'i cha byad yin

403.21(1): 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab rnams las 'dod pa thams cad 'byung ba'i dpe byad 
404.1(1): lags so/ /brjid pa'i sku mchog ri rab lhun po 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab rnams la 
404.2(1): gcam bu dang gcam sag mi mnga' zhing snang srid yongs la brjid pa'i dpe byad 
404.3(1): lags so/ /gsung dbyangs rig pa'i khu byug ltar sgrogs pa ni/ gshen rab rnams 
404.4(1): kyis spro ba ma bskyed pa mi mnga' ba'i dpe byad lags so/ /thugs kyi dgongs pa 
404.5(1): gser phur brag la btab pa 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab rnams la g.yo rtsol mi mnga' 
404.6(1): ba'i dpe byad lags so/ /gsang ba thabs dang shes rab 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab 
404.7(1): rnams kyis thabs dang shes rab kyi sbyor ba gsang ba'i dpe byad lags so/ /'khor 
404.8(1): lo bsgyur ba rlung dang 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab rnams kyis bon gyi 'khor lo ma bskor 
404.9(1): ba'i sa mi mnga' ba'i dpe byad lags so/ /sku mdog rin po che kha dog brgyad dang

404.11(1): dpe byad lags so/ /byams pa bu gcig pa'i ma dang 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab rnams 
404.12(1): la zhe sdang gsod gcod mi mnga' ba'i dpe byad lags so/ /gti mug mun pa'i 
404.13(1): tshogs gsal bar byed pa gsal ba ye shes lnga dang 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab rnams 
404.14(1): kyis mi mkhyen ba mi mnga' ba'i dpe byad lags so/ /sbyin pa ni nam mkha' las 
404.15(1): char 'bab pa 'dra ba ni/ gshen rab rnams la 'dod chags mi mnga' ba'i dpe 
404.16(1): byad lags so/ /tshul khrims 'khyags sbram dbang la btab pa 'dra ba ni/ gshen 
404.17(1): rab rnams la nyams pa dang zhig pa mi mnga' ba'i dpe byad lags so/ /bzod pa 
404.18(1): dgra rnams 'dul kyang nyam nga ba med pa ni/ gshen rab rnams la dgra tshogs kyis 
404.19(1): nyams nga ba med pa'i dpe byad lags so/ /snying rjes mtha' yas pa'i sems can 
404.20(1): thams cad nyon mongs pa dang bral zhing thar bar byed pa ni/ gshen rab rnams
